health_conditions: allergic reaction to semaglutide and tesamorelin combination

side_effects.description: Day 1 of semaglutide + tesamorelin: small itchy bump near tesamorelin injection site resembling mosquito bite
Day 2: increased itching near injection site
Day 3: hives around injection site; extremely itchy palms, soles of feet, and lips — suspected allergic reaction to combination of semaglutide and tesamorelin

protocol_notes: Started tesamorelin about 1 month before semaglutide. Stopped tesamorelin until finished with semaglutide. Restarted tesamorelin 1 week after last semaglutide dose — small reaction. No reaction 2 weeks after last semaglutide dose. Suspected interaction between the two compounds.
